{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Demon
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A demon in [[Latari Forest]] is said to catch innocent people and cut them up.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Demon]] is a rumored entity in the [[Latari Forest]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
